name: Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken and 3/4 cup lemon juice in a bowl. Marinate for at least 6 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
2. Remove the chicken and discard the marinade. Reserve 1 tablespoon of the marinade.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, salt, and pepper. Dredge each piece of chicken in the seasoned flour (this step can be skipped).
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the chicken in several batches until golden brown.
5. Transfer the chicken to a baking dish large enough to hold it in a single layer.
6. Sprinkle reserved marinade, brown sugar, and 1 tablespoon of chicken stock evenly over the chicken.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes. Serves 4 (generous portions) or 6. Enjoy hot or cold; great for picnics.
